svg.title: Activate / Deactivate Staff Member - Process View

g.text: Activate / Deactivate Staff Member - Process View
Operator decides to change the availability\nstatus of a staff member in the system
Depending on the request:\n- Sets IsActive = false (deactivate)\n- Sets IsActive = true (activate)
UPDATE StaffMembers SET IsActive = ?, UpdatedAt = NOW() WHERE Id = ?
Displays confirmation message\nand updates staff list or details view
showError("Staff member already in this state")
showError("Failed to change staff member status")
